rawContent: {"stage":"build","insights":[{"kind":"convention","text":"Payload CMS sensitive fields use both access.read/update: () => false AND hidden: true for defense-in-depth.","scope":"src/collections"},{"kind":"convention","text":"Tests are colocated in the same directory as the collection under test, using findField(name) and makeMockReq() helpers.","scope":"tests"},{"kind":"decision","text":"PBKDF2 params (25000 iterations, 512 length, sha256) must match AuthService.verifyPassword exactly for cross-verification to work.","scope":"auth"},{"kind":"decision","text":"Centralize password hashing into a dedicated utility (password-hash.ts) rather than inline in the collection, to keep hashing logic reusable and testable.","scope":"src/auth"}]}
